---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for forge-agent
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always
frustrated when [...]

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Who would benefit from this feature? What workflow does it enable?

## Example

```python
# How would you like to use this feature?
import forge_agent
# ...
```

## Scope

- [ ] Core (breaking change — please open a discussion first)
- [ ] Extension (new optional capability)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] CLI only
- [ ] Generator only (LLM code-gen)

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR
- [ ] I need help implementing this

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or examples about the feature request.
